title: CVE-2023-21508 — CVSS 6.7 (MEDIUM)
content:
# CVE-2023-21508

CVSS Score: 6.7 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2023-05-04T21:15:11.207
CWEs: CWE-787, CWE-787

Out-of-bounds Write vulnerability while processing BC_TUI_CMD_SEND_RESOURCE_DATA command in bc_tui trustlet from Samsung Blockchain Keystore prior to version 1.3.12.1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code.

References: https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2023&month=05, https://security.samsungmobile.com/serviceWeb.smsb?year=2023&month=05
